column1: # text = Royal Bank of Scotland to disappear for customers outside Scotland
# text = The brand RBS is to be reduced to a back office role, according to the bank's chief executive.
# text = Royal Bank of Scotland will disappear for customers outside Scotland.
# text = Ross McEwan told BBC Scotland that the RBS brand was associated with the bank's global ambitions.
# text = It has retreated from them since it nearly collapsed eight years ago and had to be bailed out.
# text = During that time, brand strategists have used 'RBS' to protect other consumer finance brands.
# text = It was backed with millions of pounds in sponsorship of international sport, from Six Nations rugby to Wimbledon champion Andy Murray.
# text = But now, it has been judged right to let more national brands come to the fore.
# text = Royal Bank of Scotland will be used with Scottish customers, but will not be initialised.
# text = In England and Wales, all RBS references, outside head office and the stock exchange listing, will be changed to NatWest.
# text = Bank brand is already used for customers in the Republic of Ireland and Northern Ireland.
# text = There are other, smaller brands for private banking, which will get more prominence - Coutts, Adam & Co, Drummond, and Holt's Military Bank.
# text = Mr McEwan was interviewed during a tour of customers and staff in Inverness-shire.
# text = He told BBC Scotland: \"The RBS brand will end up becoming our investor brand and the one that our staff are employed with, because we are now becoming much more a bank of brands.\"
# text = As the bank itself became a global brand, RBS became the global brand.
# text = I'm now saying we no longer have global aspirations, we have local aspirations.
# text = Each one of those brands will stand for something quite different in their own communities, and our staff will work with customers under those brands.
# text = RBS had already stated that it would not to continue its Six Nations sponsorship, and it has been raising the profile of different brands in its sports sponsorship.
# text = "The time is right for us to move to the bank of brands, because underneath (we've been asking) how do we focus on making this a better bank for customers?"
# text = It would have been very cynical three years ago if we'd said we're going to be a great bank for customers and put those brands out there.
# text = But with the work we've been doing, focussing on the customers needs, not our own, I think you're seeing a lot of change.
# text = We can bring those brands back up again, so I think the time is right.
